languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

languages.text: "Высказывание залогировано Нунциусом и отправлено в долгосрочный вокс-архив. Гипотеза о способности магоса Ханейманна понимать и применять юмор выдвинута, но не подтверждена окончательно".

languages.text: «Nuncius ha registrado el comentario y lo ha añadido al archivo de voco de largo plazo. La hipótesis sobre la capacidad del magos Haneumann para entender y aplicar el humor se ha propuesto, pero aún no se ha confirmado de forma definitiva».
languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

languages.text: 「その発言はヌンキウスによって記録され、長期ヴォックス・アーカイブに保存されました。マゴス・ハネウマンがユーモアを理解し応用する能力を有するという仮説が提起されましたが、決定的には確認されていません」
languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

traits.locale_text: 「その発言はヌンキウスによって記録され、長期ヴォックス・アーカイブに保存されました。マゴス・ハネウマンがユーモアを理解し応用する能力を有するという仮説が提起されましたが、決定的には確認されていません」

languages.text: “该言论已由努恩修斯记录，并存入长期音阵档案。关于哈努曼贤者或能理解并运用幽默的假设已提出，尚待最终证实。”
languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

languages.text: "Die Anmerkung wurde von Nuncius notiert und an das langfristige Voxarchiv übermittelt. Die Hypothese über Magos Haneumanns Fähigkeit, Humor zu verstehen und anzuwenden, konnte allerdings nicht abschließend bestätigt werden."
languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

languages.text: « La remarque a été enregistrée par Nuncius et placée dans les archives vox. L'hypothèse de la capacité du magos Haneumann à comprendre et utiliser l'humour a été proposée, sans être pour autant entièrement validée. »
languages.original_text: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."

languages.text: "Bu söz, Nuncius tarafından kaydedildi ve uzun süreli voks arşivine işlendi. Magos Haneumann'ın mizahı anlama ve uygulama yeteneğine dair hipotez öne sürülmüş ancak kesin olarak doğrulanmamıştır."
